violations.detail: GPU devices are not available during docker build. Commands like nvidia-smi and runtime framework checks like torch.cuda.is_available() will fail or return misleading results. Move these checks to runtime (CMD, ENTRYPOINT, or an initialization script).
violations.message: GPU hardware query at build time will fail: nvidia-smi

violations.message: GPU hardware query at build time will fail: torch.cuda.is_available()
